news.headline: Aircastle Limited announces Chief Legal Officer Christopher Beers retirement on Feb 28, 2025, to serve as Senior Advisor.
news.summary: On October 22, 2024, Aircastle Limited based in Stamford, Connecticut disclosed the upcoming retirement of Christopher Beers from his role as Chief Legal Officer, set to take effect on February 28, 2025. Following his retirement, Mr. Beers will transition into a Senior Advisor position within the Company for a period of up to one year, providing assistance during the interim.

news.headline: Eastnets climbs to 54th in Chartis RiskTech100® 2025 rankings, wins for trade-based AML innovation, combating financial crime.
news.summary: In London, Eastnets, a company specializing in compliance and payment solutions, has moved up to the 54th position in the esteemed Chartis RiskTech100® 2025 rankings. They have also received an award for their trade-based AML solution. This acknowledgment emphasizes Eastnets' expertise in assisting financial institutions in addressing the growing risks of financial crime in international trade. The significance of trade-based AML is increasing, particularly as criminal organizations take advantage of the intricate nature of global trade. Eastnets' recognition in the Chartis RiskTech100® 2025 rankings showcases their dedication to combating financial crime in the industry.

news.headline: Dotmatics unveils Luma Antibody & Protein Engineering Solution for comprehensive antibody discovery.
news.summary: Dotmatics has recently unveiled the initial installment of their Dotmatics Luma Multimodal R&D Solutions Geneious, integrated seamlessly within Luma to exhibit diverse cross-therapeutic functionalities under one comprehensive platform. This announcement was made in Boston on October 22, 2024. Dotmatics is renowned for their scientific software used in research and development, enhancing connectivity in the field of science.

news.headline: GM's profits rise due to surging prices and avid US demand.
Binance, Crypto.com cede market share to competitors as DEX platforms show growth - Bybit and OKX poised to benefit.
news.summary: The decreasing market share of Binance may offer a notable opportunity for smaller competitors such as Bybit and OKX. This shift in market dynamics could allow these smaller exchanges to capture a larger share of the market, potentially leading to increased competition and innovation in the cryptocurrency trading industry. This trend highlights the changing landscape of the market, with Binance's dominance being challenged by emerging players like Bybit and OKX. Investors and traders may find this development intriguing as it could impact the overall dynamics and competitiveness within the cryptocurrency exchange sector.

news.headline: FCA defends strict crypto regulations amid criticisms of stifling innovation, significantly impacting UK's financial leadership.
news.summary: The Financial Conduct Authority (FCA) has stood by its strict regulations concerning cryptocurrencies, refuting suggestions that its stringent requirements impede innovation and weaken the United Kingdom's position as a global financial leader.

news.headline: Southern First Bancshares, Inc. reports Q3 2024 financial results with positive momentum.
news.summary: Southern First Bancshares, Inc., the holding company for Southern First Bank, released its financial results for the quarter ending on September 30, 2024. The company, traded on NASDAQ under the ticker SFST, stated that their third quarter performance maintained a favorable trend. More specifically, the financial report for this period highlighted key numbers and figures showcasing the company's growth and success during this time frame in Greenville, South Carolina.

news.headline: Hamilton Zanze sells 125-unit Woods of Williamsburg after six years of ownership, completing several upgrades.
news.summary: Hamilton Zanze, a prominent multifamily real estate investment firm based in San Francisco, disclosed that they have recently sold Woods of Williamsburg, a garden-style community comprising 125 units. This sale comes after the firm completed numerous upgrades during their six-year ownership of the property. The upgrades were aimed at improving the overall quality and desirability of the community.

news.headline: 7-Eleven offers BOGO pizza & $1 candy deals this Halloween | Oct 22, 2024 | IRVING, Texas.
news.summary: Indulge in spooktacular treats such as pizza and candy for only $1 - if you're brave enough! 7-Eleven, Inc. based in Irving, Texas, is making this Halloween season extra delicious. As the leading convenience store chain worldwide, they are reintroducing a beloved offer to...

news.headline: LogicSource OneMarket® selected by Spend Matters for 4th consecutive year in "50 Providers to Watch" list.
news.summary: In Westport, Connecticut on October 22, 2024, LogicSource, a top provider of procurement services and technology, revealed their inclusion in Spend Matters' "50 Providers to Watch" list for the fourth time. This recognition marks another achievement for the company, showcasing its industry-leading capabilities.

news.headline: US stocks edge cautiously ahead of earnings from Lockheed Martin, GM, with markets posting gains for sixth straight week. 1/5 of S&P 500 companies set to report this week, with cumulative earnings expected to rise for a fifth quarter. Nasdaq Composite up, Dow Jones and S&P 500 down. Nasdaq 100 -0.65%, Dow Jones -0.48%, SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust down 0.50% to $580.71, Invesco QQQ ETF -0.65% to $492.19. AI stocks led gains; for more details visit Benzinga.com.
news.summary: Wall Street showed caution amidst multiple earnings reports, but still saw gains for the sixth consecutive week. The Nasdaq Composite started positively, though Dow Jones and S&P 500 began in the red. Around 20% of S&P 500 firms were set to report earnings this week, with cumulative earnings projected to rise for a fifth straight quarter. Major companies like GE Aerospace, Lockheed Martin, 3M Company, Verizon Communications, and General Motors would report earnings. Futures performance varied, with Nasdaq 100 down 0.65%, S&P 500 flat, Dow Jones down 0.48%, and R2K down 0.90%. In premarket trading, SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust fell 0.50% to $580.71, and the Invesco QQQ ETF declined 0.65% to $492.19. The markets closed with caution on the first day, with S&P 500 and Dow Jones in the red, but Nasdaq Composite making gains, led by AI stocks.

news.headline: Valvoline™ Global unites Jessica Hawkins and Jeff Gordon for historic driver matchup in Charlotte, Hawkins drives Hendrick Motorsports car to celebrate women in motorsports.
news.summary: Valvoline™ Global commemorates women in motorsports with Jessica Hawkins driving the Hendrick Motorsports NASCAR Cup Series Gen 6 two-seater car at Charlotte Motor Speedway. Hawkins' drive coincides with the anniversary of the first woman competing in NASCAR's premier division 75 years ago in the same city. Hendrick...

news.headline: CEO emphasizes trust and productivity boost at BT Business in recent interview.
GM's profits rose due to high prices and robust US demand, with a substantial increase in revenue.
Partnership announced between Advyzon Investment Management and Syntax Data to provide advisors with customized financial portfolios.
news.summary: Advyzon Investment Management (AIM), a part of the Advyzon technology platform, and Syntax Data, a financial data and technology firm specializing in the Affinity® Data system, have teamed up in Chicago. By combining their expertise, they aim to offer financial advisors the opportunity to create personalized financial portfolios efficiently. This partnership intends to leverage AIM’s indexing capabilities with Syntax’s technology to generate tailored investment solutions on a larger scale.

news.headline: STRATTEC SECURITY CORPORATION (Nasdaq: STRT) schedules conference call & webcast for Q1 FY2025 financial results.
news.summary: Milwaukee-based STRATTEC SECURITY CORPORATION (Nasdaq: STRT) has scheduled a conference call and webcast to discuss its financial results for the first quarter of Fiscal Year 2025. The announcement does not give specific numbers, but it provides important information for investors and stakeholders.

news.headline: Clearside Biomedical showcases promising data on ODYSSEY Wet AMD & Suprachoroidal Injection Platform at multiple AAO 2024 events.
$VZ Verizon Q3 2024 Earnings
CEO of failed crypto exchange allegedly embezzled $1.47M to buy Bitcoin and pay off debts. Regulatory action taken.
news.summary: The financial market regulator in Australia has charged the former CEO of a now-closed cryptocurrency exchange for allegedly embezzling $1.47 million. The Australian Securities and Investments Commission (ASIC) revealed that Grant Colthup, the former CEO of Mine Digital, reportedly utilized the funds to settle the debts of the parent company, ACCE Australia Pty Ltd, or to purchase cryptocurrencies for various individuals, or potentially both. The customer who deposited the funds never received the intended... (Full story on the provided website).

news.headline: Fortalice Solutions named Inc.'s 2024 Power Partner Award Winner alongside 359 other companies supporting entrepreneurs nationwide.
news.summary: In Charlotte, North Carolina, Inc., a prominent media brand and resource for entrepreneurs and business leaders, revealed the recipients of its third annual Power Partner Awards. This renowned list celebrates B2B entities nationwide that have demonstrated success in assisting entrepreneurs and fostering the growth of startups. For this year, Fortalice Solutions was named among the 359 companies recognized across various essential business sectors. Each organization on the Inc. Power Partner award list has shown exceptional support and dedication to empowering entrepreneurs.

news.headline: 908 Devices (Nasdaq: MASS) will report Q3 2024 financial results on Nov 12, 2024, management will conduct conference call.
news.summary: Boston-based 908 Devices Inc. (Nasdaq: MASS), a leader in handheld and desktop chemical analysis devices, is set to release its third-quarter 2024 financial results on Tuesday, November 12, 2024, before the market opens. The company will host a conference call at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time / 5:30 a.m. Pacific Time, with a live webcast accessible on the company website's "Investors" section at www.908devices.com. This update was shared today, highlighting the upcoming financial disclosure event.

news.headline: UL Solutions Inc. (NYSE: ULS) to announce Q3 2024 results on Nov. 5 before market opens with webcast at 8:30 a.m. EST.
news.summary: A leading global safety science company, UL Solutions Inc. (NYSE: ULS), based in Northbrook, Illinois, is set to disclose its financial performance for the third quarter of 2024 on Tuesday, Nov. 5, before the market opening. Following this release, at 8:30 a.m. EST (7:30 a.m. CST) on the same day, the management will conduct a webcast and conference call to discuss the results. The conference call will be live-streamed online and will be accompanied by a slide presentation. This announcement is a part of the company's commitment to transparency and communication with stakeholders.

news.headline: GlobalMeet wins Best Events Technology in 2024 Global Tech Awards, marking its fifth industry award this year.
news.summary: Phoenix-based company GlobalMeet has been recognized as the Best Events Technology in the 2024 Global Tech Awards. This marks the fifth industry award received by GlobalMeet this year.

news.headline: Pipedrive wins 2024 Inc. Power Partner Award, part of 359 B2B firms supporting entrepreneurs and business growth.
news.summary: Pipedrive, a sales CRM designed for small businesses, was awarded the 2024 Power Partner Award by Inc., a prominent media brand for entrepreneurs. Inc. recognized Pipedrive among 359 B2B companies for their exceptional support to entrepreneurs and contribution to business growth. This award reflects Pipedrive's effectiveness in helping small businesses, as noted in the annual list released by Inc.

news.headline: Greenridge Growth Partners closes Fund II at $255M, oversubscribed with commitments from diverse investor base.
news.summary: Greenridge Growth Partners, an investment firm in Austin, Texas, specializing in burgeoning software firms, has successfully secured $255 million in fresh capital commitments for its second fund, Greenridge Growth Partners II, L.P. This fund exceeded expectations in terms of funding, closing within a year of its launch due to being highly oversubscribed. The funding was sourced from a varied group of investors, including endowments, foundations, asset managers, family offices, and fund-of-funds.

news.headline: Ziff Davis will join one investor conference on Nov 20, 2024, as part of RBC Capital Markets Global Tech, Internet, Media, and Telco event.Summarized: Ziff Davis (NASDAQ: ZD) participates in RBC Capital Markets conference on Nov 20, 2024.
news.summary: In New York, Ziff Davis, Inc. (NASDAQ: ZD) revealed its involvement in an investor conference in November. Specifically, the company will be partaking in the 2024 RBC Capital Markets Global Technology, Internet, Media, and Telecommunications Conference. The event is set to take place at the InterContinental New York Barclay, New York, NY on November 20, 2024, at 1:20 pm (ET). For those unable to attend in person, a webcast of the conference will be available at https://kvgo.com/rbc/ziff-davis-inc-nov-2024. Ziff Davis, a vertically focused digital company, aims to showcase its presence at this conference.

news.headline: Medable Inc. named top patient engagement trailblazer by Everest Group, scoring perfect in all categories out of 44 orgs.
news.summary: Medable Inc., a prominent technology platform specializing in clinical trials, has been recognized as a Trailblazer in Everest Group’s first-ever "Clinical Trial Patient Engagement Products Assessment" conducted among 44 organizations. Medable stood out as the sole recipient of a flawless score across all criteria, underscoring its comprehensive approach to enhancing patient engagement within clinical trials. The company's Patient Caregiver Network (PCN), touted as the industry's primary and most extensive platform, played a crucial role in this achievement.

news.headline: Lithium Ionic Corp awards Hatch and Reta with EPCM contracts for Bandeira Project development in Brazil, moving towards production phase.
news.summary: In Toronto on October 22, 2024, Lithium Ionic Corp. revealed the commencement of Engineering, Procurement, and Construction Management ("EPCM") services for the Bandeira Lithium Project in northeastern Minas Gerais State, Brazil. This pivotal step signifies the shift towards the construction phase of the Project, crucial for its development and eventual production. The enhancement of engineering and construction management services will propel the Project forward within the projected timeline, aligning with the imminent approval of site permits. Lithium Ionic Corp. is listed as TSXV: LTH; OTCQX: LTHCF; FSE: H3N.

news.headline: SS&C Blue Prism named RPA leader by Everest Group for 7th year. 2024 assessment. SSNC on Nasdaq.
news.summary: In Windsor, Connecticut on October 22, 2024, SS&C Technologies Holdings, Inc. disclosed that SS&C Blue Prism was recognized as a leading entity in Robotic Process Automation (RPA) by the Everest Group Robotic Process Automation (RPA) Products PEAK Matrix® Assessment 2024. SS&C Technologies Holdings, Inc. operates under the Nasdaq symbol SSNC. This acknowledgment highlights SS&C Blue Prism's distinction in the field of RPA.

news.headline: INTREPID Alliance forms Scientific Advisory Board to advance antiviral research, including experts in virology and immunology.
news.summary: Industry-leading specialists in virology, immunology, and drug advancement are set to collaborate with the INTREPID initiative to expedite the development of revolutionary antiviral treatments for potential viral pandemics. Based in CAMBRIDGE, Mass., this collaboration was announced on Oct. 22, 2024. The INTREPID Alliance, comprising cutting-edge experts, aims to accelerate the production of antiviral therapies for emerging viral threats.

news.headline: IsoEnergy and Purepoint Uranium form joint venture covering 98,000+ hectares in Athabasca Basin.
news.summary: Toronto, October 22, 2024 - Two leading companies, IsoEnergy Ltd. and Purepoint Uranium Group Inc., have officially signed a contribution agreement to establish a joint venture. IsoEnergy is listed on the Toronto Stock Exchange as ISO and on the OTCQX as ISENF. On the other hand, Purepoint is listed on the TSXV as PTU and on the OTCQB as PTUUF. This partnership aims to leverage the strengths of both entities and capitalize on the growing opportunities in the market. This collaboration marks a significant milestone for the companies, as they pool resources and expertise to pursue strategic initiatives together.

news.headline: BGC Group to acquire OTC Global Holdings, enhancing Energy, Commodities, and Shipping business. New York, Oct. 22, 2024.
news.summary: BGC Group, Inc. (Nasdaq: BGC) revealed on October 22, 2024, its plan to enhance its Energy, Commodities, and Shipping sector through an acquisition deal. The leading global brokerage and financial technology company will be acquiring OTC Global in a strategic move. This acquisition aims to strengthen BGC's position in the market and expand its offerings in these key sectors. The financial details of the agreement were not disclosed. This acquisition signifies BGC Group's commitment to growth and diversification within the industry.

news.headline: Philip Morris International reports strong Q3 & first nine-months results; raises 2024 EPS guidance to $6.20-$6.26, Adjusted EPS to $6.45-$6.51.
news.summary: Philip Morris International Inc. (PMI) (NYSE: PM) has revealed its 2024 third-quarter and first nine-month results. CEO Jacek Olczak shared that in Q3, the company achieved outstanding performance, recording all-time high quarterly net revenues and earnings per share. The success can be attributed to robust momentum in all regions and categories, with a notable increase in IQOS adjusted in-market sales growth, strong ZYN volumes, and a resurgence in overall performance.

news.headline: 50 seafood suppliers join ReposiTrak's traceability network to meet regulatory deadlines, leveraging its innovative solution.
news.summary: Fifty seafood suppliers in Salt Lake City have joined forces with ReposiTrak as regulatory deadlines near. These suppliers are utilizing ReposiTrak's advanced traceability solution, which does not require any hardware.

news.headline: Brain Corp and JRTech Solutions team up to offer autonomous inventory management in Canada. Integration of BrainOS Sense Suite with JRTech's Pricer ESL platform.
news.summary: Brain Corp has announced the integration of its BrainOS® Sense Suite with JRTech Solutions' Pricer electronic shelf label (ESL) platform for improved inventory management. The collaboration was confirmed on October 22, 2024, in Montreal and San Diego. Brain Corp, a leading autonomous technology company, aims to enhance inventory control with this partnership.

news.headline: Jennifer Press becomes Chief Strategy Officer at RiskSpan on Oct. 22, 2024. Leading provider of data and risk management analytics.
news.summary: An announcement was made on October 22, 2024 in Arlington, Virginia by RiskSpan, a prominent company specializing in data and risk management analytics for securities, loans, and private credit. The company welcomed Jen Press to its leadership team as the Chief Strategy Officer. Jen's appointment brings strategic expertise to the team as she takes on this new role.

news.headline: Marqeta introduces new products - UX Toolkit and Portfolio Migrations - enhancing program management capabilities.
news.summary: In Oakland, California, Marqeta (NASDAQ: MQ), a leading global card issuing platform, has announced the launch of two new products – UX Toolkit and Portfolio Migrations – as part of its card program management tools. These new additions aim to enhance the company's already robust program management capabilities by leveraging its advanced technology and extensive experience in card implementation. The UX Toolkit and Portfolio Migrations are designed to support the success and growth of Marqeta's customers' card programs.

news.headline: EasyVista partners with Xeridia to enhance IT maturity through ITSM, combining EasyVista's platform with Xeridia's expertise.
news.summary: A recent collaboration in New York has brought together EasyVista's cutting-edge ITSM platform with Xeridia's specialized skills in executing intricate and high-worth IT initiatives. This partnership aims to leverage the strengths of both companies to enhance IT services and projects.

news.headline: Dana wins Powertrain Product of the Year for Spicer™ eSP502 e-Transmission with PTO at Power Progress Summit 2024.
news.summary: In Maumee, Ohio on October 22, 2024, Dana Incorporated (NYSE: DAN) was declared the recipient of the Powertrain Product of the Year Award for its Spicer™ eSP502 e-Transmission with Power Take-off (PTO) at the recent Power Progress Summit 2024 in Chicago on October 1-2. This achievement highlights Dana's innovative approach in the automotive industry.

news.headline: Canadian Solar responds to Trina Solar's patent infringement complaint filed on October 8, 2024.
news.summary: On October 22, 2024, Canadian Solar Inc. released a statement regarding a patent infringement complaint filed by Chinese competitor Trina Solar Co., Ltd. on October 8, 2024. Canadian Solar, traded as NASDAQ: CSIQ, has responded to the complaint.

news.headline: RedHill partners with US center to develop Opaganib against Phosgene injury, with multiple in vivo studies planned.
news.summary: Plans have been detailed for several in vivo studies to evaluate opaganib as a treatment for phosgene inhalation injury. The collaboration is focused on testing the effectiveness of opaganib as a potential medical countermeasure. The goal is to determine if opaganib can progress to additional conclusive studies sponsored by the U.S. government.

news.headline: Formedics appoints Helen Moran as Chief Content & Product Officer, to lead innovation with AI-powered platform for HCPs.
news.summary: Formedics, based in Basking Ridge, N.J., made headlines on October 22, 2024, with the announcement of Ms. Moran's appointment to spearhead innovation and implement personalized, peer-to-peer content solutions using the company's AI-powered platform. This strategic move aims to target healthcare professionals and enhance engagement within the HCP community.

news.headline: TD Bank joins LTX, an AI-powered bond trading platform backed by Broadridge, as liquidity provider. Oct. 22, 2024.
news.summary: On October 22, 2024, LTX, a corporate bond trading platform utilizing AI technology, with support from Broadridge Financial Solutions, Inc. (NYSE: BR), revealed that TD Bank has become a part of its e-trading platform via its subdivision TD Securities Automated.

news.headline: Wayfair introduces Wayfair Rewards loyalty program, promising exclusive benefits & significant value for members.
news.summary: In Boston on October 22, 2024, Wayfair Inc. (NYSE: W) introduced its latest loyalty program, Wayfair Rewards. This program offers enrolled members special privileges providing substantial value and convenience. These exclusive benefits include a wide range of perks...

news.headline: Comoto's Airbags Save Campaign in 2024 breaks records with sales increase, boosting awareness for new partnerships in 2025.
news.summary: In October 2024, a national safety campaign conducted in the United States resulted in a significant boost in sales for the year, marking a new record for the company. This successful initiative also led to heightened awareness on safety measures. As a consequence of this achievement, the groundwork has been laid for prospective partnerships in the upcoming year of 2025. Comoto Holdings, recognized as the leading retailer of motorcycle parts and accessories in America, and the parent organization of RevZilla, played a key role in the campaign's success. This development signifies a positive trajectory for the company's future growth and expansion.

news.headline: Safehold Inc. (NYSE: SAFE) will release Q3 2024 financial results on Oct 28, 2024, after market close. Earnings call to follow.
news.summary: On October 22, 2024, Safehold Inc. (NYSE: SAFE) disclosed plans to unveil its third-quarter 2024 financial results after the market closes on Monday, October 28, 2024. The company will conduct an earnings conference call to discuss these results and its performance.

news.headline: ROAM Communications named an Inc. 2024 Power Partner for supporting entrepreneurs & companies.
news.summary: In the latest annual ranking, the outstanding B2B enterprises across the nation are acknowledged for their excellence in assisting entrepreneurs and fostering business expansion. Located in Tulsa, Oklahoma, ROAM Communications, a specialized public relations consultancy group, has been named among these top companies. This acknowledgment was announced on October 22, 2024, according to PRNewswire.

news.headline: Enthusiast Gaming to share Q3 2024 results on Nov 14, 2024.
DSMB approves Phase 2 of OCU410ST GARDian Clinical Trial by Ocugen for Stargardt Disease gene therapy.
news.summary: On October 22, 2024, Ocugen, Inc., a biotechnology company listed on NASDAQ as OCGN, disclosed that the Data and Safety Monitoring Board for the OCU410ST GARDian clinical trial has greenlit the recruitment process for the next stage of the Phase 1/2 trial. OCU410ST, also known as AAV5-hRORA, is an innovative gene therapy candidate intended for treating Stargardt disease. This trial progress signifies a significant step forward in the development and testing of potential treatments for this condition.

news.headline: Denny’s Corp reported Q3 results for Sept 25, 2024, including performance of Denny's and Keke's. Investor Day held as part of updates.
news.summary: Denny’s Corporation, based in Spartanburg, South Carolina, disclosed its financial performance for the third quarter ending on September 25, 2024. The company, listed on NASDAQ as DENN, operates both Denny's Inc. and Keke's Inc. During this period, they released their business update, highlighting operational insights.
